channel.title: GitHub Rust Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Rust in GitHub

item.title: hyperium/hyper
item.description: An HTTP library for Rust

item.title: huggingface/candle
item.description: Minimalist ML framework for Rust

item.title: mainmatter/100-exercises-to-learn-rust
item.description: A self-paced course to learn Rust, one exercise at a time.

item.title: FuelLabs/fuel-core
item.description: Rust full node implementation of the Fuel v2 protocol.

item.title: risingwavelabs/risingwave
item.description: Best-in-class stream processing, analytics, and management. Perform continuous analytics, or build event-driven applications, real-time ETL pipelines, and feature stores in minutes. Unified streaming and batch. PostgreSQL compatible.

item.title: juhaku/utoipa
item.description: Simple, Fast, Code first and Compile time generated OpenAPI documentation for Rust

item.title: sigp/lighthouse
item.description: Ethereum consensus client in Rust

item.title: lancedb/lance
item.description: Modern columnar data format for ML and LLMs implemented in Rust. Convert from parquet in 2 lines of code for 100x faster random access, vector index, and data versioning. Compatible with Pandas, DuckDB, Polars, Pyarrow, and PyTorch with more integrations coming..

item.title: juspay/hyperswitch
item.description: An open source payments switch written in Rust to make payments fast, reliable and affordable

item.title: Schniz/fnm
item.description: 🚀 Fast and simple Node.js version manager, built in Rust

item.title: libp2p/rust-libp2p
item.description: The Rust Implementation of the libp2p networking stack.

item.title: pola-rs/polars
item.description: Dataframes powered by a multithreaded, vectorized query engine, written in Rust

item.title: neondatabase/neon
item.description: Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

item.title: fujiapple852/trippy
item.description: A network diagnostic tool

item.title: rust-lang/rust-clippy
item.description: A bunch of lints to catch common mistakes and improve your Rust code. Book: https://doc.rust-lang.org/clippy/

item.title: microsoft/windows-rs
item.description: Rust for Windows

item.title: thomas-mauran/chess-tui
item.description: Play chess from your terminal 🦀

item.title: fish-shell/fish-shell
item.description: The user-friendly command line shell.

item.title: jtroo/kanata
item.description: Improve keyboard comfort and usability with advanced customization

item.title: apache/datafusion
item.description: Apache DataFusion SQL Query Engine

item.title: influxdata/influxdb
item.description: Scalable datastore for metrics, events, and real-time analytics

item.title: rgwood/systemctl-tui
item.description: A fast, simple TUI for interacting with systemd services and their logs
